LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-14-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DOMINIC GUARDADO'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CAL. CODE OF CIV. PROC. SECTION 664.6 AND ENTER DISMISSAL AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DOMINIC GUARDADO'S "MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CAL. CODE OF CIV. PROC. 664.6 AND ENTER DISMISSAL AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES" IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL CONCEDES "THIS COURT HAS AUTHORITY TO ADJUDICATE AND ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT." (OPP.2:15.) ATTORNEY FEES OF $2,265 ARE REASONABLE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING WITH A COVER LETTER STATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Cal. Code Of Civ. Proc. Section 664.6 And Enter Dismissal And For Attorneys' Fees; Declaration Of Brian Leach; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MARK ZANOBINI, Esq. of Law Office of Mark Zanobini (tel: 415-392-8400) for Plaintiff.
Atty. BRIAN LEACH, Esq. of Leach & McGreevy LLP (tel: 415-775-4455) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT DOMINIC GUARDADO's Motion To Enforce Settlement Pursuant To Cal. Code Of Civ. Proc. Section 664.6 And Enter Dismissal And For Attorneys' Fees.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Dominic Guardado's "motion to enforce settlement pursuant to Cal. Code of Civ. Proc. 664.6 and enter dismissal and for attorneys' fees" is granted. Plaintiff's counsel concedes "this Court has authority to adjudicate and enforce the settlement." (Opp.2:15.) Attorney fees of $2,265 are reasonable.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling with a cover letter stating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
